title: Short Title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 10-A.  LOUISIANA ENERGY AND POWER AUTHORITY

§4545.1.  Short Title

This chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "State Power Authority Act".

Added by Acts 1979, No. 772, §1, eff. July 20, 1979.
